meta.name: FAA Part 107 Advisory Rule Pack
meta.disclaimer: Advisory pre-flight planning aid only. It does not provide FAA authorization, weather briefing, legal advice, or a substitute for Remote PIC judgment.

numeric_rules.title: Maximum altitude
numeric_rules.recommendation: Keep the operation at or below 400 ft AGL unless a valid structure exception, authorization, or waiver applies.
numeric_rules.pass_message: Requested altitude {value:.0f} ft AGL is within the {threshold:.0f} ft advisory limit.
numeric_rules.fail_message: Requested altitude {value:.0f} ft AGL exceeds the {threshold:.0f} ft advisory limit.

numeric_rules.title: Minimum flight visibility
numeric_rules.recommendation: Wait for improved visibility or relocate the mission.
numeric_rules.pass_message: Visibility {value:.1f} SM meets the minimum {threshold:.0f} SM advisory threshold.
numeric_rules.fail_message: Visibility {value:.1f} SM is below the minimum {threshold:.0f} SM advisory threshold.

numeric_rules.title: Horizontal cloud clearance
numeric_rules.recommendation: Increase distance from clouds or delay the flight.
numeric_rules.pass_message: Horizontal cloud clearance {value:.0f} ft meets the {threshold:.0f} ft advisory threshold.
numeric_rules.fail_message: Horizontal cloud clearance {value:.0f} ft is below the {threshold:.0f} ft advisory threshold.

numeric_rules.title: Vertical cloud clearance
numeric_rules.recommendation: Maintain at least 500 ft below clouds or delay the operation.
numeric_rules.pass_message: Vertical cloud clearance {value:.0f} ft meets the {threshold:.0f} ft advisory threshold.
numeric_rules.fail_message: Vertical cloud clearance {value:.0f} ft is below the {threshold:.0f} ft advisory threshold.

controlled_airspace.title: Controlled airspace authorization
controlled_airspace.recommendation: Use LAANC or DroneZone/ATC authorization as applicable before operating in controlled airspace.

night_operations.title: Night/twilight lighting
night_operations.recommendation: Confirm required training and anti-collision lights visible for at least 3 statute miles.

location_risk.title: Location risk factors
location_risk.regulation: Remote PIC pre-flight assessment / operational safety
location_risk.recommendation: Check NOTAMs, TFRs, B4UFLY/FAA data, public safety activity, airport proximity, and Remote ID.

operations_over_people.title: Operations over people
operations_over_people.recommendation: Verify the aircraft category, declaration, exposed rotating parts requirements, and operating limitations.
operations_over_people.active_message: Operation over people was selected; category-specific compliance must be verified.

operations_over_moving_vehicles.title: Operations over moving vehicles
operations_over_moving_vehicles.recommendation: Avoid moving vehicles unless all Part 107 operating category conditions are met.
operations_over_moving_vehicles.active_message: Operation over moving vehicles was selected; verify category and transit-only conditions.
operations_over_moving_vehicles.inactive_message: No operation over moving vehicles selected.
